creator: russo@bogodyn.org
text:
Whatever my issue was, deleting all the qt6- ports (plus wireshark) then just reinstalling wireshark got all the packages installed properly, including all those that had failed to upgrade with staging errors when updating via portupgrade.

I am always loathe to try the "delete and reinstall" approach lest it not work and I be left without some tool I need, but in this case it solved whatever weird problem I had.

It was not a build-out-of-order issue, since the things that should have been updated first were updated first without problem.  But it's clearly not an issue with pkg-plists or other such problems.

Quoting Emily Littella:  "Never mind."
